problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: The key to What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? is Bacteriophage surface display for targeting — specifically Bacteriophage surface display — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
